phases.name: build
phases.prompt: Create a complete, single-file HTML5 Tetris game. It must be one self-contained .html file using a <canvas>, arrow-key controls (left/right/down to move, up to rotate), the 7 tetromino shapes, line clearing, and a visible score. Output ONLY the full HTML file inside one ```html code block, with no text before or after it.

phases.name: pause

scorers.rubric: The HTML implements a working pause toggle bound to the 'p' key that stops and resumes the Tetris game loop.
